steps.title: Compare the two actions
steps.content: Gogol carves his name into clay and leaves his signature below paintings. In both cases, he makes a visible sign of his name on an object.

steps.title: Choose the shared meaning
steps.content: Choice B means moves past, Choice C means rotates or changes, and Choice D means goes after or imitates. The remaining choice means makes a visible sign or impression, fitting both underlined words. The answer is A.
